AuthError.configuration_description: There's a problem with the server configuration. Please try again later.
AuthError.accessDenied_description: You don't have permission to sign in.
AuthError.verification_description: The sign-in link is no longer valid. It may have been used already or expired. Please request a new one.
AuthError.oauthSignin_description: Could not start the sign-in process. Please try again.
AuthError.oauthCallback_description: Something went wrong during sign-in. Please try again.
AuthError.oauthAccountNotLinked_description: This email is already associated with another sign-in method. Please sign in using your original method (Google, GitHub, or email link).
AuthError.default_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

Byok.newKeyDescription: Your key stays in this browser. It's sent only with your own generation requests and never stored on the server.
Byok.consoleLink: Get a key from the {provider} console
Byok.encryptHint: You'll re-enter the passphrase once per session. Without one, the key is stored unencrypted in this browser.
Byok.passphraseShort: Passphrase must be at least 4 characters.
Byok.unlockDescription: Your key is encrypted in this browser. Enter your passphrase to unlock it for this session.
Byok.forgotPassphraseConfirm: This deletes the encrypted key in this browser. You'll need to paste your API key again.
Byok.modelHint: Haiku is fastest and cheapest. Opus is highest quality. Sonnet is the balanced default.
Byok.bannerPlatformBudgetLowSub: Add your own Anthropic API key to keep generating — your key stays in this browser.
Byok.bannerUserCapSub: Add your own Anthropic API key for unlimited generations — your key stays in this browser.
Byok.bannerRateLimitHeadline: Too many requests in the last hour.
Byok.bannerRateLimitSub: Wait an hour, or add your own Anthropic API key to keep generating now.
Byok.confirmRemoveMessage: Your saved key will be deleted from this browser. You can paste it again any time.
Byok.unlockDescriptionWithProvider: Your {provider} key is encrypted in this browser. Enter your passphrase to unlock it for this session.
Byok.anthropicModelHint: Haiku is fastest and cheapest. Opus is highest quality. Sonnet is the balanced default.
Byok.openaiModelHint: GPT-5.5 is the latest. GPT-5.4 is the balanced default. Nano/mini variants are cheaper; GPT-4 models are still available for compatibility.
Byok.openrouterModelHint: {count} structured-output-capable models. Switching changes which model handles your generations.
Byok.openrouterModelsFailed: Couldn't load the OpenRouter model list. Try again in a moment.
Byok.thinkingHint: Let the model spend extra tokens reasoning before it answers. Slower; can improve complex output.

Chat.inputHelp: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

Error.heading: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

ErrorCode.PROMPT_BLOCKED: Your prompt wasn't accepted by the safety filter. Try rephrasing it.
ErrorCode.RATE_LIMIT: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.
ErrorCode.SCREENING_UNAVAILABLE: Safety check is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
ErrorCode.SCREENING_CONFIG: There's a server misconfiguration. Please try again later.
ErrorCode.VALIDATION: There was an issue with your prompt. Please check and try again.
ErrorCode.TURNSTILE: Bot verification failed. Please try again.
ErrorCode.GENERATION_LIMIT: You've used all your free generations. Sign up for more!
ErrorCode.SESSION_RATE_LIMIT: Too many sessions created. Try again later.
ErrorCode.FORBIDDEN: You don't have access to this resource.
ErrorCode.GUEST_BLOCKED_AUTH_IP: An account has already been used from this network. Please sign in to continue.
ErrorCode.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email address before generating. Check your inbox for a verification link.
ErrorCode.PLATFORM_BUDGET_LOW: Free generations are temporarily unavailable. Add your own Anthropic API key to continue.
ErrorCode.BYOK_INVALID: That Anthropic API key didn't work. Check it and try again.
ErrorCode.BYOK_RATE_LIMIT: Your Anthropic account is out of credits or rate-limited. Check usage at console.anthropic.com.
ErrorCode.BYOK_AUTH_FAILED: Your Anthropic key was rejected mid-generation. It may have been revoked — paste a fresh one.
ErrorCode.BYOK_BAD_REQUEST: Anthropic rejected the generation request. The prompt may be too long or hit a content policy.
ErrorCode.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ForgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.sentDescription: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.

Info.title: About WebsitePls
Info.description: WebsitePls generates a single web page from your description using AI. You can refine the result by sending follow-up messages in the chat.
Info.feature1: Generates one page based on your prompt

Landing.heading: What would you like to <accent>build</accent>?
Landing.description: Describe your website and we'll generate it in seconds.
Landing.placeholder: e.g. "A portfolio site for a photographer with a dark theme and image gallery"
Landing.inputLabel: Describe the website you want to build
Landing.example1: A portfolio site for a photographer with a dark theme, image gallery, and contact form
Landing.example2: A landing page for a coffee shop with menu, hours, location map, and online ordering
Landing.example3: A personal blog with a minimalist design, featured posts section, and newsletter signup
Landing.example4: A SaaS product landing page with pricing tiers, feature comparison, and testimonials

Login.heading: Sign in to WebsitePls
Login.description: Sign in to save your projects and get more generations.
Login.termsPrefix: By signing in, you agree to our
Login.errorOAuth: This email is already associated with another sign-in method.
Login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Message.generationFailed: Generation failed. You can try again.
Message.interrupted: Previous generation was interrupted. Please try again.
Message.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
Message.timedOut: Generation timed out. Please try again.

Metadata.title: WebsitePls — AI Website Generator
Metadata.description: Describe your website and generate it in seconds with AI.

NotFound.heading: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

Notify.prompt: Notify me when this is done?
Notify.completedBody: Click to view your generated page.
Notify.errorBody: Open the tab to see what went wrong.
Notify.unsupported: Notifications aren't supported in this browser.
Notify.blockedHint: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser's site settings to use this feature.

Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.placeholder: Privacy policy content goes here. Replace this placeholder with your actual policy.

Projects.heading: My Projects
Projects.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first one!
Projects.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete this project and all its versions. This action cannot be undone.
Projects.deleteError: Failed to delete project. Please try again.
Projects.deleteGeneratingError: Cannot delete a project while it is generating.

Publish.descriptionPublish: Choose a URL for your site. Anyone with the link will be able to view it.
Publish.descriptionPublished: Anyone with the link can view your site.
Publish.slugInvalidChars: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Must start and end with a letter or number.
Publish.slugTaken: That URL is taken. Try another.

ReferenceMaterial.label: Reference material
ReferenceMaterial.guestDisabled: Sign in to attach reference material
ReferenceMaterial.errorWrongType: Unsupported file type (PDF, TXT, or MD)

ResetPassword.heading: Set a new password
ResetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
ResetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This password reset link is missing or malformed.
ResetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
ResetPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Settings.heading: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings.
Settings.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF. Max 2 MB.
Settings.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Settings.notificationsDescription: Get a desktop notification when your generation finishes, even when you're working in another tab.
Settings.byokDescription: Bring your own key to skip per-account limits and pick the model. Keys are stored in this browser only — they never reach our server except as a per-request header on your own generations.

Signup.heading: Create an account
Signup.description: Sign up to save your projects and get more generations.
Signup.termsPrefix: By creating an account, you agree to our
Signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.placeholder: Terms of service content goes here. Replace this placeholder with your actual terms.

VerifyBanner.message: Please verify your email to start generating.
VerifyBanner.sent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
VerifyBanner.sendError: Failed to send email. Please try again.

VerifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
VerifyEmail.errorDescription: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new verification email.
